name: InsightDeck
tagline: Product analytics, funnel tracking, cohort analysis, and custom dashboards. Understand your users without the enterprise price tag. Free, forever.
metaDescription: InsightDeck is a free analytics platform that replaces Mixpanel. Track user behavior, build funnels, analyze cohorts, and create dashboards. No event limits, no data caps.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">📊</text></svg>

features.title: Event Tracking
features.desc: Track any user action with structured event data. Auto-capture clicks, page views, and form submissions, or define custom events with properties for precise analysis.

features.title: Funnel Analysis
features.desc: Build multi-step conversion funnels to see exactly where users drop off. Compare funnels by segment, time period, or acquisition channel to find optimization opportunities.

features.title: Cohort Analysis
features.desc: Group users by signup date, first action, or any custom property. Track retention curves over weeks and months to measure the real impact of product changes.

features.title: Custom Dashboards
features.desc: Build interactive dashboards with drag-and-drop charts, tables, and metrics. Share live dashboards with your team or export as scheduled PDF reports.

features.title: User Profiles
features.desc: See the complete journey of any individual user. Every event, session, and property change is recorded in a timeline view for debugging and support.

features.title: Real-Time Data
features.desc: Events appear in your dashboard within seconds of occurring. Monitor live user activity, track launches in real time, and set alerts for anomalies.

includes: Auto-capture for clicks and page views
